phrases.context: An underground gallery from the 3rd century AD, built by the Romans as a substructure for a public forum above. One of the best-preserved Roman monuments in northern France.

phrases.french: On peut descendre visiter les galeries ?
phrases.english: Can we go down to visit the galleries?
phrases.phonetic: on puh day-SOND-ruh vee-zee-TAY lay gah-luh-REE
phrases.context: Yes — the underground galleries are accessible and free to enter. Entrance is beneath the Place du Forum in the city centre.

tips: Free entry — one of Reims's most underrated sights
Reims was an important Roman city called Durocortorum — capital of Belgica province
The galleries are cool year-round — a welcome escape in summer heat
